question: Do you accept customer-supplied garments?
answer: In almost all cases we do not accept customer-supplied garments — we have no control over where they came from or how they were handled prior to printing. If they come from one of our trusted vendors, any issues can usually be resolved quickly. If you supply garments not from our vendor, cost is at your own risk and we are not responsible for final outcomes or replacement. Exception: contract work customers should inquire about special pricing (MOQ is 10k pieces per year).
